name: Crime Shop Simulator: A Prison Boss Game

reviews.review_title: So fun to play! But one bad thing
reviews.review_description: I was just scrolling through the Meta store and I have horizon+ so I download prison boss probation and when I loaded in I was hooked! Then when I found out that it was muitplayer I told my friends to download it and they had fun. But there's one bad thing I can't seal the popcorn bags in the downtown level even my friends had trouble doing it so fix the popcorn bag!

DEVS PLS ADD MORE FREE MODES. I still love the game but if there were more free modes I might just go insane. Great game I definitely recommend it. Over all great game, I love the company and devs but still if there was one more free level it would be great. I love trying to get a high score i believe i am on the leader board right now and that is very fun.

Thanks.

I'll start by saying I love this game it's really fun and the egg puns crack me up lol but it tries really hard to ruin your good time when it comes to physics and general picking up stuff can be difficult because it can't seem to figure out exactly what you're trying to grab leading to very frustrating situations and the utensils like the pot and molds and stuff can be very unwieldy when they have water in them like barely tap something and water spills all over the place but other than that I have a great time playing and I love the buying and selling and resources management aspect of this game it's really fun and engaging but I just wish it was more user friendly instead of having to fight with your own hands to do anything

No other video game series has tried this. But these people, COOKED and it delivered. I love the different maps and suppliers and tools. There is still so much to unlock and I hope they see this review and know how much I support their game!

WHY IS IT CALLED CRIME SHOP SIMULATOR IT SOUNDS LIKE A SLOP GAME PRISON BOSS PROPABATION SOUNDS LIKE YOU ARE THE LEADER OF WHERE YOU ARE AND WHAT YOU ARE SELLING SWITCH IT BACK other then that its a realy good game but the multiplayer is kinda buggy and random matches are hard to find pls play random matches if your reading this and for the love of god we need to protest to get the original name back

developer_response.body:
Hey there, sorry for the disappointment!

If you are looking for more information regarding our name change, please head to our developer post: https://www.meta.com/experiences/quest/developer-post/3908316702632360/

Thank you for your ongoing support!

reviews.review_description: The game is amazing but the new name is a little weird. It makes it look like one of the crappy games that aren't that good and the new picture for the menu makes it look like shovelware but other than that it's amazing.

Make it if cakes, sodas, beer, popcorn, and other baked goods more realistic.

example: cake needed frosting to be fully made,
                popcorn when u filled it up with popcorn inside make it we can close the top to make it realistic,
and popcorn cameral make it we can fill up the bag and shake it to make a bag of cameral

Please add baking trays, auto mixer, bigger oven, and a sink.

Awesome game and really love it

Great game i even suggested 3 player to 4 player and a staff member replied saying there on it we talked a little then a few months later he said done when the update came out and this is just the
Discord in it you can find players to player with and you do encounter some bugs and some annoying features but all good games have that and they are fixing and changer so all players can enjoy the game they listen to there community and have 1 DLC and soon another 
 5 stars if I could do 10 or even 100 I would edited WHY WHY WHY CHANGE THE NAME IT WAS PERFECT AND YOU HAD TO CHANGE IT WHY THE NEW NAME SUCKS ITS SUPPOSED TO BE A SEQUEL TO THE ORGINAL GAME NOT A ROBLOX SIMULATOR THE NAME WAS UNIQUE IT WAS GREAT AND YOU HAD TO CHANGE IT WHY WHY WHY AND YES IM DRAMATIC

This game is so fun I can’t stop playing!!!!!!! But I would like more free levels cuz 3 levels ( 5 with the dlc’s ) can get a little boring after a while so more levels please I’m begging. Also if you make more levels make them free pls I can pay for it but I have from friends who can’t so more levels plllllls

( I will change this to 5 stars once you add more levels :)

This game is great I love that police flip out when they see you with something illegal, bit there should be a sandbox/free-play mode so that you can play for as long as you want and unlock all of the items.  But overall a great game!!!

I love prison boss so much it’s actually so addicting. I just bought the two extra things that like stitch one and the one way like make wrenches and stuff. It’s so fun and it was like only one dollar so 10 out of 10 would recommend.
￼
I love this game and playing with my friends it feels so accomplishing to get your base fully decked out, and i love the game play.
THIS GAME IS AWESOME. Don't listen to the haters co-op is really fun and I played for hours.
You should definitely get this game its really fun and its a unique game and has tons of stuff to do! 5 ⭐️

reviews.review_title: Good game but did not get our leverage
reviews.review_description: Me and my friend spent 3 hours grinding on level 2 just to find out that our game glitches and we got nothing fix the game trebuchet

developer_response.body:
Hey Bubster1214, sorry about the poor experience. If you haven't joined our Discord yet, please join and let us know about your issue so we can investigate and see what happened there.

discord.gg/prisonboss

Thank you!

reviews.review_title: Probably one of my favorite games
reviews.review_description:
I first got this game I I thought it would be bad like the first game I was dead wrong.
This game is genuinely just entertaining the fact that you have more options to sell feels like the first game but better

developer_response.body: Thank you very much Jael, really happy to hear that you're having fun! <3

reviews.review_description: The name frickin sucks it sounds like a Roblox game 🥀🥀🥀

I started in the play test when the game was really glitchy and I beat the old game but when this released it was 100000% better so many more features must have for people who loved the first game; physics, the physics in this game are so realistic and surprisingly good out of all the games I have played this is one of my favorites, multiplayer mode is amazing u can join ur friends play with random people or join people from community’s or discords. The only problem is that grind is kinda difficult each game is really long and u need a lot of leverage to get some stuff and the other thing is the goal, this game doesn’t have much of a goal I think there should be a story mode, and it hard to rejoin runs with random people if u didn’t finish your run. Otherwise amazing game

Great game!! Just wany to start there... I have two headsets that share a horizion account, one head set will play multiplayer perfect, the second is stuck on a can't connect screen and wont allow to play multiplayer. What can I do?

reviews.review_title: This game actually is so buggy
reviews.review_description: Me and my friend were playing a 30 day run and the second after the last day finished, our screens went black. It did not show us what our score was and ended up having to rejoin the game. After rejoining we checked the save and it was not there as well as the leverage we were supposed to gain in the shop. We spent 2+ days for absolutely nothing. Please fix these game ruining bugs.

developer_response.body:
Hey bwefghtgg, please join our Discord with your friend and let us know about your issue - we would love to compensate you! Bugs are never fun and you earned your progression. <3

-> discord.gg/prisonboss

reviews.review_description: I like that you can do stuff like that
I got this game YESTERDAY and ive already beat it and I can't get a refund this game makes it look so big but it only has 6 or 5 levels

This game is do niche theres almost no content made out of The game but this game has so much to offer. This is a perfect example of a hidden Gem.

The game in general is good i wish the nights were longer but ehe 
but i think its kinds BS the fact that there's already like 2 dlc,s

in general it is a good game id be a lier if i said i wasnt but i feel like with how little base game content there is its a little scummy to be pumping out dlc,s already ontop of the fact thats theres now a complete edition you can buy makes me lose hope that they care too add more base game content

reviews.review_title: I bought a new map and lost it
reviews.review_description: So i bought both of the maps that you can by and now the game crashed and i lost both of them so i want a refund!!!!

developer_response.body: Hello there, when you purchase one of our DLCs - it's yours! There is no way of losing them, you can play whenever you want. :)

reviews.review_title: Love the game so far, but…
reviews.review_description: So I’ve been playing the game for a few hours now, it’s great, different in its own way, and feels very fresh well keeping the original gameplay loop that made it fun. But I found an infinite grain exploit, if you buy the bag of 8 grain, open it and empty it, you can sell the bag by itself back to 20$ back. So… yeah, love the game but figured I’d let you guys know about an exploit I discovered after less than an hour of gameplay.

developer_response.body:
Uh oh, that's a bug for sure! Thanks for flagging it for us, we will investigate the issue.

*don't tell the other chickens about this one*

reviews.review_description: The game has hours of game play and if you find a friend to play with it is the best time we bonded so much ￼

This game has A GREAT art style, A LOT OF GOATED mechanics, and a lot of fun and creative crafts. Too cheap for it's content, the 20$ ARE F###ING WORTH IT, and trust me, bc I've played this game for at least 20  hours

developer_response.body: THANKS FRIEND, GOAT REVIEW.

reviews.review_description: I played this with my friend and we loved the custom game, we can’t stop playing highly recommended

This game is amazing. The only thing that we could get is way more content. After you complete the 3 levels (and dlc level) you just grind the perks and rewards for each of the egg factions. After that you really don’t have much to do. Playing with friends though is very fun that keeps the game going on for a bit. But after you’ve done everything there really isn’t to play unless you like to grind up the leaderboard.

What I think the devs should make is more levels and maybe even world wide levels. You would start in New Yolk (starting point) and work towards all over the world. From France to Japan you can do a lot of levels and each have there own factions. Each faction should give you different awards like they do now but  maybe increase the knowledge tree awards (what I mean by this is more things to unlock like more cosmetics and stuff). 

This can make this game so much more fun and last a lot longer. Still a very great game but maybe more levels and gameplay.

Been asking them for months to fix issues with colocation in their discord community but it’s still not working.

It will spawn u together but the guest will get a black screen and the host can see the room walls are blacked out. Host will also briefly see the guest join in the right position but then suddenly jolt back and disappear out of the room.

developer_response.body:
Hey XxAirWalker26xX,

We're aware of the issues with colocation right now. We're a small team, so we have to prioritize bugs one way or another. Sadly colocation isn't a top priority because of its niche userbase. It's on the list though!

Very sorry about this.

reviews.review_title: Might be the best multiplayer game
reviews.review_description: I havent been able to play since the 4 player update which based off the video i think fixed this but my one issue WAS that you and your partner couldnt use the whole space, you each had one half but beside that which i thing got c hanged this game is peak, making illeagal substances might not be fit for young chinldren but boy is it fun making an intense game while still be a fun and funny blast with your friends, now having 4 players and a shared space this game is sooooo good if you considering buying, BUY worst case senario you refund, and all though i do recoment playing with a friend solo is just as fun if you agree please find this post helpful so more people can share the joy of this game

developer_response.body: Thank you legend, we really appreciate all the kind words! We love our community, so we are more than happy if we made you happy with our updates. ❤️

reviews.review_description: I got the game from meta horizon+ and to be honest I’d buy meta horizon+ just for this one game. It’s a great pass time. Also the game feels a little bit comedic to me cus things like sodas are illegal 🤣

hi this message is truly developers thanks for making this really awesome game but please can you add one more map that you don't have to pay for i am gonna buy the next dlc but i really want to play with some of my friends that can't pay for a new maps it would be awesome if you could add a new map for free thank you for the game

I found this game from pb 1 and and I saw that they were making a second game and I got it and I loved immediately it’s fun although they should make it so you can hold more money on the register so it doesn’t be come as laggy as it does but over all it very fun to play especially with friends which gets more chaotic with more people but it’s really good worth the money.

Love it really makes you addicted, but I wish for even more furniture and storage with fun concepts. More crafting options for the same item would be cool and also more items that help/make it easier to craft items like the barrel and the coffee machine. Apart from that this game is worth your money and the dlc are really great!!
The "custom game update" is not even working. I see no custom game option anywhere

developer_response.body:
Hey bootsncats1234,

The Custom Game option can be found on the top right of the screen after dropping Bobby on a level :) Let us know if you still can't find it!

Don't hesitate to update your review if you found them!

reviews.review_description: The best vr team game ever and i have been playing vr for years and five seen multiple team work games and this is the beast one i have played

Yes it’s has its buggy moments but the devs work hard to improve everyday. Even from the moment it’s released the support has been unmatched!!  They have won my loyalty for an eternity!! Keep up the great work guys 🔥🔥🔥 The DLCs offer a nice way for the community to support the devs further expanding and developing the game. The replay value is crazy especially with FREE multiplayer, that’s the power of DLC. This game changed my position on vr games and I can’t wait to see how great this game can become!!
Just one thing that needs to be added are corrupt cops you can pay to not take your crafting item if caught

developer_response.body: Well, you can already throw some money at them when they are coming towards you! :D Of course, you should do this before they detect you.

reviews.review_description: the best game i recommend to play it

developer_response.body: Thank you very much kind friend!

reviews.review_description: This game is very nice but it gets boring after the second map, this is my opinion but i find making drinks to sell just to get a few reputation is repetitive i must say you cant get a better gake for $20

Its a great game, single player and multiplayer, great art style and animation, its really forgiving to rubberbanding with bad internet, active community with devs who listen to what to say (like everyone complaining about the tools being heavy) and try to make the experience better
Amazing

reviews.review_description:
Game is fun, however it being rated comfortable, I don’t agree. I felt sick 10 minutes in and had to stop playing altogether. You have to turn around in order to put stuff away or fill bottles up and one little tilt of the stick while filling can send some overboard. 

Nothing against the game, it seems like it’d be a blast to play, but man the motions will make you puke. Wouldn’t suggest for those that have the same issues.
But how come I can't play offline? I expected to be able to play single player offline but I can't. Except for that, amazing game 💗🙌

reviews.review_title: Just as good as the first one!!!!
reviews.review_description: They’re are some mechanics that do make it a bit more difficult and complicated but once you get the rhythm going it’s easy I loved the first one and even love the 2nd one even more I can’t wait for the future this game holds😤😤
This game is amazing. I couldn't stop playing with my friend

First off this game is really fun with all the recipes you can make and I like how to get most of the stuff you have to do orders for certain classes. I also like that you get to customize your area and pick where to put your cabinets, drawers, and other furniture. One I thing I don’t like is that it gets repetitive after a while since updates take a long time.
Nice game but im waiting 32 days for custom game 😭😭😭😭😭

developer_response.body:
TRY IT NOW!

Update: HAVE YOU TRIED IT YET?

reviews.review_description: Theres a bug where i open my cabinet everything dissappears and it doesnt respawn its a game ender  :(

developer_response.body:
Hey there, that sounds like an annoying bug for sure. Sorry about that!

Could you please join our Discord and let us know more about it? We would love to help you out and fix it asap.

-> https://discord.gg/prisonboss

Thanks!

reviews.review_description: This game brings so much things in the VR multiplayer space. The best part is you and your friend being on edge on whether the cops are coming! Seriously though. I’ve played lots of games in my life. This was one of the best…

Most of the game is really good, the only three things that are bad is A: multiplayer game that you have to pay for (isnt the biggest deal but still might turn people off) B: sorta buggy,  though the game is still early development. and C: paid game with micro transaction (though they arn't anything big and they are cheap) ignore all of those things, and this is probably one of the best multiplayer games ever. The gameplay loop is very addicting in a good way, and its kinda hard to get bored of it. Top it off with a great community and great devs, and you have you self a masterpiece. Please, if your thinking about getting this with friends, especially if its on sale, buy it, dont look back, and you WILL love it.

Overall, the game is pretty solid, the visuals can be a bit lacking and head hurting at times (not often that I’ve noticed yet) but the game mechanics and gameplay itself are really solid, pretty sweet game, especially if you get a friend to join you. :)

developer_response.body:
Hey Hredline,

Thanks a lot for the kind words :)

If you want to give us more insight into your visual issues, don't hesitate to contact us on Discord!

reviews.review_description: I have herizon plus for 3 months free but I'm going to be so sad because I will not be able to play after the 3 months free

developer_response.body:
You can always join us later on sale fox9x! We also tend to do giveaways on our Discord channel, who knows, you might be a lucky one! 👀

-> discord.gg/prisonboss

reviews.review_title: New gen game but in a good way.
reviews.review_description: Devs doing great,I love how most items have basic lines it’s satisfying for me idk. The DLC is definitely worth it and I’ve played for hours, can’t explain how excited I am for the next one. I haven’t found many bugs and the ones I did find were patched within a couple days. Great progression and since there’s a lot to unlock it doesn’t get boring and I’ve been loving it so far all the updates are great and actually help instead of doing stuff we don’t need. Grateful devs actually care about the game and listen to their community. The fact this game is new gen makes it even better, it has advanced graphics and playstyles like Roomscale etc.

reviews.review_title: The BEST Vr Game I have played so far.
reviews.review_description: Prison Boss Prohibition is the best Vr game I have ever played due to its wonderful REPLAYABILITY, the excellent crafting system, and just so many humongous step-ups from the original game quantity AND quality wise! The problems I do have with this game are how janky it can get with some bugs that don't make some runs desirable, but that's what comes with a game that has yet to be finished. This game is miles better than the original and I 100% recommend it. Fix the barrel though.
